programs.title: North Korea: Dark Secrets
programs.desc: (M) Discover how the North Korean people suffered famine, labor camps and public executions, while the Kim regime spent three generations relentlessly pursuing nuclear ambitions.

programs.title: Pearl Harbor: Survivors Remember
programs.desc: (M) The attack on Pearl Harbor shocked America, altering history forever. Years later, the heroes responsible for defending America give their firsthand accounts of events.

programs.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
